steps.title: Identify the described limitation
steps.content: The passage names the research's critical problem: “a myopic focus on a few countries.” This directly signals what the research claimed to have—comprehensive coverage.

steps.title: Match comprehensiveness to the word choice
steps.content:
Exhaustiveness means comprehensive coverage, the direct opposite of a myopic focus.

The other options address unrelated qualities: novelty means newness, immutability means unchanging nature, and pervasiveness doesn't denote comprehensive scope.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
